title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules derived from publicly available statements by Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei for deciding what to build with Claude. The framework is presented as guidance for avoiding common missteps in AI product development, applicable to side projects, startups, and organizational workflows.
